title: osbeckia aspera var. travancorica
intro: Osbeckia aspera var. travancorica, a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, is native to the Western Ghats of India. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Osbeckia aspera var. travancorica include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
